vocab.meaning: một nguồn tri thức dồi dào
vocab.example: Wikipedia is essentially a fountain of knowledge that I tap into whenever I need to clarify a complex concept.

vocab.meaning: lựa chọn hàng đầu/nơi tìm đến đầu tiên
vocab.example: YouTube has become my go-to for DIY tutorials because the visual instructions are incredibly easy to follow.

vocab.meaning: ở vị trí tiên phong/hiện đại nhất
vocab.example: I frequently visit TechCrunch to stay at the cutting edge of technological advancements and startup news.

vocab.meaning: khơi nguồn cảm hứng sáng tạo
vocab.example: Browsing through Pinterest never fails to get my creative juices flowing when I'm stuck on a design project.

vocab.meaning: một cứu cánh/vật phẩm cực kỳ hữu ích
vocab.example: For a university student like me, Google Scholar is an absolute godsend for finding peer-reviewed academic sources.

vocab.meaning: giúp tôi luôn nhạy bén/tập trung
vocab.example: The challenging puzzles on NYT Games really keep me on my toes and help sharpen my cognitive skills every morning.

vocab.meaning: nắm bắt được thông tin (đang xảy ra)
vocab.example: I check Twitter several times a day just to stay in the loop with breaking news and trending global topics.

vocab.meaning: một làn gió mới (thứ gì đó mới mẻ, thú vị)
vocab.example: The minimalist design of some niche blogs is a breath of fresh air compared to most ad-cluttered mainstream websites.
When it comes to high-quality documentaries, National Geographic's online archive is second to none.

vocab.meaning: thỏa mãn chính xác nhu cầu
vocab.example: When I'm looking for a quick distraction, the short and witty articles on lifestyle sites always hit the spot.
